reviews.comment:
Horrible, te cobran $ 1800 y te lo lavan a máquina. La terminación es un desastre. Mi auto apareció con rayas que no tenía. No es recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Horrible. They charge $1800 and they machine wash it. The finish is a disaster. My car came back with scratches it wasn't there before. I don't recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Atención pésima, precios caros y lo peor es que a las 20 se ponen a limpiar y te piden que te vayas, de haber sabido cuando estaba pidiendo me iba, pero esperaron a cobrarme, casi 3000 pesos y cuando nos sentamos nos echaron que tenían que limpiar 20hs aprox martes 19/7. Se ve que les va tan bien que pueden darse el lujo de tratarte mal.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, expensive prices, and the worst part is that they start cleaning at 8 PM and tell you to leave. If I had known when I was ordering, I would have left, but they waited to charge me almost 3000 pesos, and when we sat down they kicked us out, saying they had to clean around 8 PM on Tuesday, July 19th. It seems they're doing so well that they can afford to treat you badly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1aE9iYTZnRRAB
